name: nemo-relay-plugin
description: Codex hooks that forward canonical lifecycle payloads to nemo-relay.

interface.shortDescription: Forward Codex lifecycle hooks to a local NeMo Relay sidecar.
interface.longDescription: Installs command hooks that preserve Codex hook payloads and forward them to nemo-relay for agent, subagent, tool, and lifecycle observability. Full LLM capture also requires sidecar provider routing.
defaultPrompt: Capture this Codex session with NeMo Relay observability.
